name: Factorial
description: Factorial HR platform for employee management, time-off, and payroll

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Factorial
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Generate a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Factorial → Settings → API → Generate API Key
